risk_event.summary: Simulated naval escalation near the Strait of Hormuz creates a material risk of partial disruption to India-bound crude cargoes.

evidence.title: Simulated Hormuz maritime escalation bulletin
evidence.excerpt: A simulated escalation event reports heightened risk to commercial shipping near Hormuz.

evidence.title: Simulated AIS deviation cluster
evidence.excerpt: Three simulated VLCCs altered course near the Strait of Hormuz within six hours.

evidence.title: Simulated war-risk insurance signal
evidence.excerpt: A simulated insurance input indicates a 15 percent increase in war-risk premium.

recommendations.route: Houston -> Cape of Good Hope -> Jamnagar
recommendations.rationale: Simulated option avoids Hormuz and is compatible with the seeded Jamnagar crude-diet profile.

feasibility_checks.name: GRADE
feasibility_checks.rationale: Seeded grade specifications meet the prototype compatibility threshold.

feasibility_checks.name: CAPACITY
feasibility_checks.rationale: Seeded supplier capacity supports the requested incremental volume.

feasibility_checks.name: ROUTE_RISK
feasibility_checks.rationale: Seeded Cape route risk remains below the balanced portfolio threshold.

approval.justification: Phase 0 fixture only; no external procurement action is permitted.
